mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, db_type, jdbc_url, username, password_cipher, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from data_source where id = #{dataSourceId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update data_source set name = #{name}, db_type = #{dbType}, jdbc_url = #{jdbcUrl}, username = #{username}, password_cipher = #{passwordCipher}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
